task: Ping 5 hosts (google.com, github.com, ikangai.com, cloudflare.com, httpbin.org) with 3 packets each. Write the average response time for each host to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Run a traceroute to google.com (traceroute or tracepath) and extract the hop count and final latency. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If traceroute unavailable, write the route info from mtr or alternative.
Estimate download bandwidth by downloading a known file (https://httpbin.org/bytes/102400 — 100KB) and timing it. Calculate MB/s. Write the result to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
List all open listening ports on the local machine. Show: port number, protocol, and process name (if available). Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Compare DNS resolution times for ikangai.com across different DNS servers: 8.8.8.8 (Google), 1.1.1.1 (Cloudflare), and the system default. Write the timing comparison to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Benchmark HTTP response times for 5 popular websites (google.com, github.com, wikipedia.org, reddit.com, news.ycombinator.com) using curl timing. Measure: DNS lookup, TCP connect, TLS handshake, and total time. Write results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Generate a network information report: list all network interfaces, their IP addresses, MAC addresses, and gateway. Include the default route. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Parse /etc/hosts and write a formatted table showing all hostname-to-IP mappings. Count total entries and unique IPs. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Count active network connections grouped by state (ESTABLISHED, TIME_WAIT, CLOSE_WAIT, LISTEN). Write the summary to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a script at /tmp/clive/curl_timing.sh that measures detailed HTTP timing for any URL using curl's -w format string. Show: namelookup, connect, appconnect, starttransfer, and total time. Test with https://ikangai.com. Write results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Perform reverse DNS lookups for 5 well-known IP addresses: 8.8.8.8, 1.1.1.1, 208.67.222.222, 9.9.9.9, 185.228.168.9. Write IP and resolved hostname to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
